creator: brion@queeg.com
text:
Sheldon Hearn writes:
> On Thu, 27 Nov 1997 11:18:02 PST, Brion Moss wrote:
> 
> > 	I've created a port for catdoc, a M$ Word to ASCII translator
> > 	and viewer.  The tarball is in
> > 	ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.ORG/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/catdoc.tgz
> 
> Two suggestions:
> 
> 1) This port uses old wish4.2 ... I'd suggest you patch it to use tk80
>    instead.

No problem.

> 2) The default behaviour of catdoc when operating on Word97 documents is
>    to spew high ASCII junk chars that trash the terminal display.
>    Perhaps you should mention in pkg/DESCR which versions it supports
>    and patch to cut out crapchars by default.

Hmmm, I didn't even think of that.  I'll try to find a copy of Word97
so I can check it out.  Or...could you send me a Word97 document I can
test with?

	-Brion
